description_long: This is a rectangular wooden sideboard or credenza with a natural light wood finish. The front features two cabinet doors on either side, each with a small round handle, and three central drawers, each with matching handles. The doors appear to have a lighter, possibly frosted or opaque panel inset, providing a subtle contrast to the main wood body. The top surface is flat and expansive, suitable for displaying decorative items or for practical use. The legs are simple and straight, elevating the cabinet slightly off the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood sideboard with two paneled doors and three central drawers, featuring a minimalist design and small round handles. The top is flat and the legs are straight, giving it a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors on the sides and three central drawers, all with small round handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wooden back with no visible handles, doors, or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the plain wooden side panel.
